subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto him who hath believed in God and journeyed unto Him until he reached the sacred shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی الذی آمن بالله و سافر الیه حتی دخل فی شاطی القدس فی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
